creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Oleg, hi David,

can you please try if using the "-32" parameter of ldconfig (or replacing
USE_LDCONFIG with USE_LDCONFIG32 in the port's Makefile) helps with this
problem? I do not have an amd64 machine to test this, but ldd says
everything's OK on my i386 system:

# ldd /usr/local/libexec/.hpacucli
/usr/local/libexec/.hpacucli:
        libcpqimgr.so => /usr/local/lib/compaq/hpacucli/libcpqimgr.so (0x28380000)
        libncurses.so.5 => /usr/local/lib/compat/libncurses.so.5 (0x283cd000)
        libcam.so.2 => /usr/local/lib/compat/libcam.so.2 (0x2840c000)
        libstdc++.so.3 => /usr/local/lib/compat/libstdc++.so.3 (0x2841b000)
        libm.so.2 => /usr/local/lib/compat/libm.so.2 (0x28460000)
        libc_r.so.4 => /usr/local/lib/compat/libc_r.so.4 (0x2847b000)
        libsbuf.so.2 => /usr/local/lib/compat/libsbuf.so.2 (0x28531000)

Regards,
Stefan
